title: Maintenance Worker
desc: CityBlock is looking for a highly skilled, self-motivated Maintenance Worker in Athens, GA. You'll handle routine inspections, repairs, and full interior remodel work across our residential portfolio.
reqs: High school diploma or GED required; associate degree preferred,Minimum 10 years full-time remodel and building maintenance experience,HVAC EPA certification required,Must live within 15 minutes of Athens GA,Proficient in HVAC plumbing electrical carpentry and general repairs,Skilled in painting drywall flooring deck repair siding roofing window replacement and wood rot repair,Must have own tools and reliable work truck,Must pass a clean criminal background check

title: Real Estate Operations Coordinator
desc: We're growing our student rental portfolio and looking for an enthusiastic, organized, and tech-savvy Operations Coordinator to join our team. This is a fantastic opportunity for a recent graduate who wants to build a career in property management from the ground up. A significant part of this role is marketing and analytics — you'll be driving how we attract and retain tenants, and using data to inform our strategy.
reqs: Recent graduate (Real Estate Business or Marketing preferred),Emotionally mature and professionally confident — comfortable having direct sometimes difficult conversations with tenants parents and guarantors,Strong analytical skills — comfortable pulling insights from data and presenting findings,Experience with or enthusiasm for digital marketing SEO and social media strategy,Comfortable with technology — property management platforms CRMs and Google Workspace,Embraces AI tools and is eager to use them to work smarter,Strong communicator with a friendly professional manner,Highly organized with great attention to detail,Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment,Interest in or passion for real estate is a big plus,Someone who knows Athens GA lives here or can commit to relocation
